description: The page navigates to the hotel search results for London, as indicated by the URL and tab title change.
frame_description: The browser header shows a URL change and the tab title updating to 'London (and vicinity), England'.

description: The search results page updates its state, displaying a search progress bar ('Select stay') and a promotional banner about best prices.
frame_description: New UI elements like the 'Select stay' progress indicator and a dark blue price guarantee banner appear on the page.
